query: SELECT id, title, category, illustrationStyleLock, characterCards FROM books WHERE id IN (60002, 60003, 60004);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user YjcbNGfyMCcwqGq.root --database cuoraNs8SGWCiJUcwSXm4W --execute SELECT id, title, category, illustrationStyleLock, characterCards FROM books WHERE id IN (60002, 60003, 60004);

rows.title: Varisin Malikanesi
rows.illustrationStyleLock: dark cinematic graphic-novel illustration, dramatic chiaroscuro side-lighting, cool blue shadows, warm amber highlights, desaturated noir palette: deep charcoal, slate, amber, teal accent, precise ink-wash brushwork with fine cross-hatching in shadows, low-angle or eye-level framing, tight medium shot, atmospheric depth, no text, no letters, no words | STRICT: absolutely no text, no letters, no words, no numbers, no readable typography, no title, no author name, no captions, no labels anywhere in the image | CHARACTERS (render exactly as described, same appearance in every illustration): Dedektif Tolgar (protagonist): This young adult male has dark brown hair styled in a messy, spiky fashion on top, with lighter brown eyes and a fair to medium skin tone. His face is oval-shaped, featuring a faint soul patch and goatee. He has a slim build and is wearing a dark t-shirt under a light grey or pale blue hooded jacket, accessorized with a silver rectangular pendant necklace. This young adult male has dark brown hair styled in a messy, spiky fashion on top, with lighter brown eyes and a fair to medium skin tone. His face is oval-shaped, featuring a faint soul patch and goatee. He has a slim build and is wearing a dark t-shirt under a light grey or pale blue hooded jacket, accessorized with a silver rectangular pendant necklace. | PHOTO IDENTITY LOCK: The reference image(s) provided show the EXACT face(s) of: Dedektif Tolgar. You MUST render these characters with the same face, hair, and distinctive features as shown in the reference photo(s). Treat the reference photo as a strict identity anchor, not a style reference. | STYLE CONSISTENCY: This illustration must match the exact same art style, lighting, colour palette, and character appearance as all other illustrations in this book.
